name: Readytech Holdings Limited
analysis: RDY's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 39% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.7200, stop A$1.4157, target A$2.5000 (2.56:1) — then trail it.
